title: Outsourced Sound Effects
description: Adds 100+ sound effects from other sound libraries and other game titles to Minecraft!
body:
![Logo](https://file.garden/ZuxeQ05nUSPb-fbU/outsourced.png)

Welcome to Outsourced, a resource pack that adds more than 100 sound effects to Minecraft: Java Edition recorded, taken and edited from well-known sound libraries, and most notably, other games, including lots of Valve and id Software games.

For now, there's only one version of this pack, which is a pre-release build, since I didn't feel like keeping this project to myself. And don't expect _anything_ to be in the final release, some sound effects may or may not be changed in the future.

**Are you a bad enough dude to recognize all of these sounds? Let me know!**

**_[Sounds](https://modrinth.com/mod/sound) compatibility_**

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

This resource pack is mostly vanilla-friendly, but I recommend using it with the Sounds mod, although with a few adjustments I've put in:

![Inventory typing](https://file.garden/ZuxeQ05nUSPb-fbU/Sprite-0001.png)
![Item dropping](https://file.garden/ZuxeQ05nUSPb-fbU/Sprite-0002.png)
![Chat typing](https://file.garden/ZuxeQ05nUSPb-fbU/Sprite-0003.png)
![General chat messages](https://file.garden/ZuxeQ05nUSPb-fbU/Sprite-0004.png)
![Mentioned](https://file.garden/ZuxeQ05nUSPb-fbU/Sprite-0005.png)
![Positive effect acquire](https://file.garden/ZuxeQ05nUSPb-fbU/Sprite-0006.png)
![Negative effect acquire](https://file.garden/ZuxeQ05nUSPb-fbU/Sprite-0008.png)
![Positive effect wear off](https://file.garden/ZuxeQ05nUSPb-fbU/Sprite-0007.png)
![Negative effect wear off](https://file.garden/ZuxeQ05nUSPb-fbU/Sprite-0009.png)

Each of these sounds are all unique, either to spice things up or to change a few unusual things, hence the amount of fitting sound effects.

</details>

_**Trailer**_

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/5qJT_bIxreE" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

**Download now! Only for Java Edition, tested in 1.21.x.**

_If it displays as "incompatible", that's Minecraft's doing, it works just fine._

Brought you by Nathan Silver. Do not redistribute.
